rule: Local, mock and sandbox results cannot verify these entries.

evidence.blocker: Zero-difference conversion, sampled reconciliation, a full settlement cycle and rollback backup verification are missing.
No approved production mode transition, provider configuration or gray-release evidence is registered.
No production worker takeover, duplicate-delivery and dead-letter recovery drill is registered.
No production-equivalent payment review, chargeback and concurrent shipment drill is registered.
The approved single-tenant production deployment and tenant-leakage evidence are missing.
No deployed network-boundary and capability-degradation smoke report is registered.
Named independent reviewers, adjudicator, three signed runs and leakage audit are missing.
Production PITR, offsite backup, Redis AOF, Milvus rebuild and 60-minute capacity evidence are missing.
Real owner, backup, approver, due date and evidence fields remain blank.
